channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists expected a black hole but found a neutrino factory powered by stars
item.description: A distant galaxy may produce cosmic neutrinos through extreme star formation rather than a black hole.

item.title: This giant tropical fruit could help reverse gum disease damage
item.description: A biomaterial from jackfruit latex, pomegranate peel, and simvastatin may treat severe gum disease.

item.title: Scientists reprogram brain immune cells to fight Alzheimer's
item.description: A newly identified molecule called OLE helped restore the brain's immune cells to a more protective state in Alzheimer's models. The treatment reduced...

item.title: Researchers found a Wordle strategy that wins 99% of the time
item.description: Researchers developed a Wordle-solving strategy that succeeds 99% of the time by focusing on information gain rather than likely answers. The method u...
